2026-03-24

  • sirosfoundation/signedxml
    • address review: update x/crypto to v0.49.0, add error handling to xmlenc parse helpers, check NewSigner error in test
    • test: add SetCryptoExtensions and parseCertificate tests
    • fix CI: suppress gosec G115 for safe integer conversions in keywrap
    • fix CI: add .gitleaks.toml to allowlist W3C test vectors in xmlenc tests
    • address review: hash messages before ecdsa.Sign/Verify, use switch in isECDSAAlgorithm
    • address review: handle WriteToString errors, extract getDigestAlgorithm helper, remove redundant assignment
    • feat: add SetCryptoExtensions for brainpool cert parsing and verification
    • docs: add crypto extensions section to README
    • chore: bump go-cryptoutil dependency to v0.2.0
    • address review: deduplicate RSA-PSS hash mapping into shared rsaPSSHashAlgorithms map
    • style: whitespace cleanup
    • Replace inline ECDSA conversion with go-cryptoutil
    • Rename module from github.com/leifj/signedxml to github.com/sirosfoundation/signedxml
    • chore: update dependencies
    • Apply all upstream PR review fixes to fork master
    • fix CI: add nolint:exhaustive to isECDSAAlgorithm switch
